title: MQTT Protocol
summary: Completed overview research on MQTT with emphasis on telemetry for business stakeholders. Ran 4 targeted general-mode searches, verified 8 primary source URLs (7 OK, 1 Cisco link flagged due to SSL verification failure). Deliverable: text answer only — no report, mindmap, slides, or PDFs created.
assumptions: Telemetry refers to remote measurement and streaming of device/sensor data (IoT and industrial contexts), not clinical patient monitoring specifically.
Audience needs business value, architecture, and adoption context rather than implementation-level protocol details.
General IoT and Industrial IoT use cases represent the primary telemetry scenarios unless otherwise specified.
Cisco MQTT overview was excluded from citations due to verify_sources dead-link/SSL failure; content corroborated via HiveMQ, AWS, EMQX, and Symestic sources.
